message:
🐛 Fix start-dev.sh port mismatch with frontend proxy (#4710)

start-dev.sh starts the backend on port 8080 but the Vite proxy
defaults BACKEND_LISTEN_PORT to 8081 (for TLS watchdog setups).
This causes all API requests from the frontend to fail, showing
"Backend API is currently unavailable".

Export BACKEND_LISTEN_PORT=8080 in start-dev.sh so the Vite dev
server proxies to the correct port.

Fixes #4707

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
